principle: Surfaces are UI-only. All business logic, controllers, view-models, and state machines live in shared brains. A surface importing logic directly from another surface or defining its own business logic is an ownership violation.

app-client.type: Expo React Native — customer mobile app
app-client.role: Customer-facing mobile experience — browse, discover, order, track
allowed_in_surface: React Native screens consuming controllers/hooks from shared
forbidden_in_surface: Direct API fetch (use generated client via shared controller)
Local design system or Tamagui direct imports
app-client.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-client/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18101 --android --clear

app-partner.type: Expo React Native — merchant/partner mobile app
app-partner.role: Partner-facing mobile — catalog management, order acceptance, store readiness
allowed_in_surface: React Native screens consuming controllers/hooks from shared
forbidden_in_surface: Local design system or Tamagui direct imports
app-partner.dsh_001_scope_note: DSH-001 in app-partner implements store-only readiness context. Catalog management, partner orders, finance are excluded.
app-partner.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-partner/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18102 --android --clear

app-captain.type: Expo React Native — delivery captain mobile app
app-captain.role: Captain-facing mobile — order assignment, pickup, delivery, PoD
allowed_in_surface: React Native screens consuming controllers/hooks from shared
app-captain.dsh_001_scope_note: DSH-001 in app-captain implements read-only store pickup context. Delivery lifecycle and earnings are excluded.

app-field.type: Expo React Native — field agent mobile app
app-field.role: Field agent — store onboarding, readiness, document upload, store visits
allowed_in_surface: React Native screens consuming controllers/hooks from shared
app-field.dsh_001_scope_note: DSH-001 in app-field implements store-only verification context. Full field onboarding workflow, document upload, approval mutation are excluded.

control-panel.role: Operations + management web dashboard — admin, governance, monitoring
allowed_in_surface: Next.js page components consuming controllers from DSH/WLT shared
forbidden_in_surface: Tamagui imports (control-panel uses CSS/Next.js styling, NOT Tamagui)
Direct fetch or axios (use generated typed clients via shared controllers)
control-panel.design_debt: Inline styles in DSH-001 control-panel screens — not a gate failure, deferred to pre-DSH-003

webapp.role: SCAFFOLD_ONLY — out of scope for current DSH slices

website.role: SCAFFOLD_ONLY — out of scope for current DSH slices
